titleStmt.title: SII 38.562: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 562. (A.R. No. 562 of 1912.) TIRUNĪRMALAI, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPET DISTRICT. On the south wall, Narasiṁhasvāmin shrine, Raṅganātha perumāḷ temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakkravartigaḷ śrī Rājarājadēva (III) Year 19, Mēsha, śu. di. 12, Tiruvōṇam, Monday = 2nd April 1235 A.D.

summary.p: Records a gift one Gaṇḍagōpalaṉ-māḍai by Gōvinda Bhaṭṭān, a resident of Niṉṟavūr in Puḻar-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, for burning a twilight lamp to the god Siṅgaperumāḷ of Nīrvaṇṇan temple. Two priests, Vāradarāja Bhaṭṭaṉ, and Siṅgapperumāḷ, sons of Naimisai Śrī Kṛishṇa Bhaṭṭa Sōmayāji, who possessed kāṇi right, in the temple received the gift and agreed to maintain the said twilight lamp perpetually.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 9 meṣa nā
yaṟṟu pūravapaṣattu dvādiśiyum tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum tiruvoṇattu nāḷ ja
yaṅ koṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu puḻaṟkoṭṭattu niṉṟavūr bhāradvāji Uṟupā
ṭṭur ṉāya puliyūrkoṭṭattu kāṇiy pūtūr Eḻuti UyaiyaRead upaiya govindabhaṭṭaneṉ Inir
yil ciṅkapperumāḷukku Oru sandhi viḷakkerikka kuṭutta kaṇṭa kopālaṉmāṭai 1 Immāṭai Oṉṟukkum
Ikkoyilk kāṇiuṭaiya naiyimicaiRead naimicai śrīkraṣṇabhaṭṭa sso[mayā]
jiyār piḷḷaikaḷil varadarājabhaṭṭaṉum ciṅkapperumāḷum
kaikkoṇṭu candrādityavarai Ittiruviḷakkoṉṟum celuttuvomāṉom .
Digital edition of SII 38.562 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
